ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* The text of the political statement */,
  "accuracy_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the statement's accuracy */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the statement */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person who made the statement */,
  "medium" TEXT /* The medium through which the statement was made */,
  "context" TEXT /* The context in which the statement was made */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was made */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the statement */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific event */,
  "user_submitted_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the statement */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the statement */,
  "statement_url" TEXT /* URL link to the original statement */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for additional categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_user_submitted_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_submitted_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent topic */,
  "related_topics" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related topic IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or role of the person */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location associated with the person */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the person */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the person */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to the document or publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was published */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, contributor, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "contributions_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
column_names: The text of the political statement
Reference to the topic of the statement
Reference to the person who made the statement
The medium through which the statement was made
